mechanism: Round61 backbone + global family-balanced grouped reconciliation

r68_balanced_iso_mild.description: Round61 backbone + mild family-balanced isotropic reconciliation across all parameter families.
r68_balanced_iso_mild.rationale: 最小改动验证：先看统一 family 归一化目标是否能在不破坏主干的前提下提升全局误差形态。

selection.note: Partial global signal on ['max_pct_error', 'dKg_xx']; family_dispersion_delta=-0.325153, protected_peak_regression=2.791209.

r68_balanced_strong_anchor.description: Family-balanced reconciliation with stronger anchor on strong families (Kg/Ka/bias), weak families gently co-moved.
r68_balanced_strong_anchor.rationale: 把全局目标优先放在强可观参数家族，避免“只修弱参数外观”造成的伪全局改进。

selection.note: Partial global signal on ['max_pct_error', 'dKg_xx']; family_dispersion_delta=-0.203964, protected_peak_regression=3.925116.

r68_balanced_weak_consensus.description: Family-balanced reconciliation with consensus-style weak-family freeze/refine coupling.
r68_balanced_weak_consensus.rationale: 把 weak families（Ka2/lever）与强家族一致性绑定，测试“全局协调 + 冻结弱扰动”是否更稳。

selection.note: Partial global signal on ['max_pct_error', 'dKg_xx']; family_dispersion_delta=0.023362, protected_peak_regression=4.470906.

r68_balanced_tightcap.description: Two-stage family reconciliation with tighter multipliers to emphasize deterministic global shape control.
r68_balanced_tightcap.rationale: 以更紧的乘子上限约束全局重分配，验证“窄幅但系统化”的 family 归一是否更可靠。

selection.note: Partial global signal on ['max_pct_error', 'dKg_xx']; family_dispersion_delta=-0.260501, protected_peak_regression=3.024453.

no_winner_reason: No candidate passed the Round61 clean-win gate under the same fixed dataset for the Round68 global family-balanced reconciliation axis.

strongest_signal.name: r68_balanced_iso_mild
strongest_signal.signal: best candidate r68_balanced_iso_mild: mean Δ=0.462893, median Δ=1.178165, max Δ=-0.374012, dKg_xx Δ=-0.374012, family_dispersion Δ=-0.325153, protected_peak Δ=2.791209

next_best_move: Fix the best Round68 candidate and run a one-knob narrow sweep on weak_consensus_blend or multiplier cap only, to see whether protected_peak regression can be pushed below the clean gate without losing global mean/median/max.
conclusion_line: Round68 did not produce a clean promotable winner over Round61 on the fixed mainline dataset.
mechanism_learning: Round68 keeps Round61 as a stable estimation backbone and moves adaptation to a post-estimation global family-balance reconciliation layer, which is globally motivated and interpretable by family-level RMS multipliers.
